title: fragaria moupinensis
intro: Fragaria moupinensis, also known as the Moupin strawberry or Chinese strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Fragaria moupinensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional Chinese medicine, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or dried extracts.
